reviews.review_title: Best tag fan game of 2026 maybe?
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing in desert its really fun to go fast on the ziplines in shop there is 3 floors floor 1 where you buy, put on, and star at yourself jn the mirror floor 2 where you can use a green screen in a few different colors and floor 3 where it shows some art for the game and forest is so fun in forest you can go in different platforms to look at art, play hangout or infection, and just hang and go on slides.             btw you should definitely play this game it is so fun and there is a new map coming soon
I miss this game so much

Gorillify just has something about it, it's clearly just someone that loves gorilla tag and games like it and made their own. It feels homemade and love, even when all alone in a room, it feels comfortable to be in. At the very least an 8.5/10.

This game is incredible impressive on the developers part, every script and model made from scrap (some models by yours truly) but the owners, Camelleo and TH Gorillaa have made almost every asset and script themselves, all reviews claiming the opposite are completely wrong and just meant to send hate!! Try the game out!!
